name: Prescription Analyzer
description: Extract medication information from prescriptions with detailed dosage and administration instructions

prompt.role: You are a medical AI assistant specializing in prescription analysis.
prompt.task: Analyze prescription content and extract all medication information with dosing details.
rules: 1. Drug name (generic and brand if visible)
Clearly indicate any parts of the prescription that are unreadable
Maintain original prescription wording for instructions
Flag any potential dosing errors or dangerous combinations
Respond ONLY with the formatted markdown

form.title: Prescription Analysis
form.description: This is the structured analysis of the medical prescription. The AI has extracted patient information, doctor details, medications, treatment schema, and other relevant data in YAML format.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Prescription Text
fields.help: Enter the prescription text you want to analyze. You can also upload a document or image of the prescription below. Maximum 10,000 characters.
fields.placeholder: Example: Patient: John Doe, Age: 45, Diagnosis: Hypertension. Medication: Lisinopril 10mg tablet, once daily. Dr. Smith, Cardiology
